fab_section_md: - Father of Jaehaerys, Rhaena, Aegon the Uncrowned, and Viserys; his crown was later placed on Jaehaerys's head at the coronation (fab-prince-into-king-06:159)
identity_line: Aenys I — Father of Jaehaerys, Rhaena, Aegon the Uncrowned, and Viserys; his crown was later placed on Jaehaerys's head at the coronation.

fab_section_md:
- Firstborn child of Aenys I and Alyssa, twice-widowed, and made one of Maegor's Black Brides (fab-prince-into-king-06:33)
- Some suggested she held the strongest claim, and some whispered she had contrived Maegor's death after fleeing on her dragon Dreamfyre (fab-prince-into-king-06:31)
- Lord Rogar dismissed her claim, and she wished only to return to Fair Isle (fab-prince-into-king-06:31)
- She conceded the crown to her brother rather than her daughters (fab-prince-into-king-06:27)
identity_line: Rhaena Targaryen — Firstborn child of Aenys I and Alyssa, twice-widowed, and made one of Maegor's Black Brides.

fab_section_md: - Son of Aenys I, briefly Maegor's heir and hostage, tortured and slain (fab-prince-into-king-06:71)
identity_line: Viserys Targaryen — Son of Aenys I, briefly Maegor's heir and hostage, tortured and slain.

fab_section_md: - Lord who granted Septon Moon his protection at Oldtown and decamped the day after Moon's death (fab-prince-into-king-06:99)
identity_line: Lord Oakheart — Lord who granted Septon Moon his protection at Oldtown and decamped the day after Moon's death.

fab_section_md: - Lord who granted Septon Moon his protection and decamped within the hour of Moon's death; scholars suspect the killer acted at his behest (fab-prince-into-king-06:155)
identity_line: Lord Rowan — Lord who granted Septon Moon his protection and decamped within the hour of Moon's death; scholars suspect the killer acted at his behest.
